title: Kenyan Stuffed Ugali
description: A hearty, comforting dish from Kenya, typically served with a variety of stews or soups. This recipe stuffs ugali with a flavorful pilaf.
instructions: 1. Cook the ugali according to package instructions until it forms a thick, sticky dough.
2. While the ugali is cooking, mix together the pilaf, chopped flaky, Kenyan spices, salt, and water to create a filling.
3. Once the ugali is cooked, divide it into 4-6 portions, depending on desired size.
4. Stuff each portion of ugali with the pilaf mixture, forming a ball or cylinder shape.
5. Serve the stuffed ugali hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
